name: live_apod
_note: astronomy.live_apod (server/domains/astronomy-live.js) fetches NASA's Astronomy Picture of the Day over the network. EXTERNAL-IO — auto-skipped by the harness (name matches /^live_/), so it is driven against this static contract only, never against the live NASA endpoint. The handler is fail-soft: on any fetch/parse failure it returns { ok:false, reason:... } and never throws, so the {ok:boolean} + string-reason invariants hold regardless of network state. The /lenses/astronomy NasaLivePanel calls it via lensRun({ domain:'astronomy', name:'live_apod' }). Marked external_io:true so no harness drives it against a live API.
